summary: Change sidebar background colour to light orange
description: Change the sidebar background colour from the current colour to light orange (#FFA500 or similar soft orange like #FFD580 or #FFF3E0). The sidebar component is located at spms-app/app/components/Sidebar.tsx. Update the background colour class or inline style so the sidebar appears light orange on all pages.
